home.description: If you would like a quick overview, feel free to download my resume or view it online.

web.title: Web Development
web.description: I create modern, responsive, and user-friendly websites tailored to your needs. Whether you're looking for a sleek portfolio, an engaging business website, or a dynamic web application, I focus on clean design, seamless functionality, and optimal performance. Let's build a digital presence that stands out!

ios.title: iOS Development
ios.description: I design and develop intuitive, high-performance iOS applications using Swift and Xcode. From concept to deployment, I focus on creating apps that align with your vision while delivering a seamless user experience. Whether it's a productivity tool, a lifestyle app, or a custom solution, I'm here to bring your ideas to life within the Apple ecosystem.

projects.description: WatchChain is an innovative iOS app designed to simplify the buying and selling of NFTs and cryptocurrency trading. Developed in Xcode, it offers an intuitive user interface and seamless Firebase integration for authentication and data management.

A responsive and modern portfolio website built with React and Next.js, showcasing my skills, projects, and experience as a developer. It features seamless navigation, an integrated contact form, and is optimised for performance on Vercel.

contact.title: Let's work together 🤜🏼🤛🏽
contact.description: Are you looking for a passionate developer to bring your ideas to life? As a Mobile & Web Developer, I'm eager to take on new challenges and help you create functional, user-friendly applications and websites. Fill out the form and I'll get in touch to discuss how we can bring your vision to life.

cv.tagline: Building iOS apps with SwiftUI & full-stack web apps with Angular and ASP.NET Core.
cv.about: Self-driven Mobile & Web Developer with a strong foundation in iOS (Swift, SwiftUI) and full-stack web development (Angular, ASP.NET Core, Next.js). Completed 200+ hours of hands-on courses and a certified professional qualification in App Development. Multilingual communicator with hands-on experience in fast-paced customer-facing environments. Passionate about clean code, modern design, and continuously levelling up.

experience.title: My Experience 🛠️
experience.description: Throughout my career, I have gained extensive and diverse experience across various industries, which has cultivated a strong work ethic, refined problem-solving abilities, and solid teamwork skills. These varied roles have provided me with a versatile skill set and a proactive mindset. I enjoy taking on new challenges, quickly adapting to different environments, and constantly seeking ways to grow and contribute to collective success.

education.title: My Education 📚
education.description: I completed a comprehensive training programme in app development, where I gained a strong foundation in building mobile applications and understanding software development principles. To further enhance my knowledge, I pursued additional learning through Udemy courses covering modern technologies such as Kotlin, JavaScript, React, and Angular. My commitment to continuous learning has equipped me with the tools to tackle complex projects and adapt to evolving technologies.

skills.title: My Skills 🚀
skills.description: I have extensive experience in developing modern applications and web solutions, with a primary focus on Swift and JavaScript. I create powerful iOS applications as well as dynamic web applications. I also have solid knowledge of Kotlin for Android development and proficiency in modern frontend frameworks such as Angular and React. I stay committed to maintaining clean, efficient code while adhering to industry best practices.

about.title: About Me 👤
about.description: I'm Alexej, a passionate Mobile & Web Developer focused on creating modern, user-friendly applications and innovative web solutions. I specialise in building scalable apps for the Apple ecosystem as well as performant, responsive websites. I combine technical expertise in Swift and SwiftUI with comprehensive knowledge of web technologies and modern frameworks. My goal is to deliver high-quality software that excels both technically and visually.
